message:
feat(engine): expand shipped path parity verifier with divergence detail and input matrix coverage

Extends the shipped_path_parity_verifier module with additional
divergence classification capabilities and broader input matrix
coverage for JS/TS workloads across frankenctl command families.

- Add divergence detail fields for more precise mismatch categorization
- Expand integration tests with additional command family coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
